title: Ochnella debeerstii
intro: There is not enough information on the plant "Ochnella debeerstii" available.
taxonomy: Ochnella debeerstii is a species in the family Ochnaceae. It is native to tropical Africa. The classification of Ochnella debeerstii is within the plant kingdom, specifically in the division Magnoliophyta and the class Magnoliopsida. This classification places Ochnella debeerstii as a flowering plant within the order Malpighiales. Further classification would include the family Ochnaceae and the genus Ochnella.
uses: Unfortunately, I couldn't find any information about the specific medicinal uses of Ochnella debeerstii.
benefits: Unfortunately, I couldn't find any information about the specific health benefits of Ochnella debeerstii.
